description_long: This is a dense cluster of modern office buildings, featuring a mix of rectangular and cylindrical towers with flat roofs and numerous windows. The structures are primarily composed of dark glass and steel, with some lighter accents and horizontal banding that emphasize the buildings' height. The tallest towers are cylindrical, with ringed architectural details near the top, while the shorter buildings are boxy and interconnected, forming a cohesive urban block. The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, providing a sleek and uniform appearance. The complex likely includes multiple entry points at street level, with recessed or glass doorways typical of commercial office buildings. The overall design reflects a contemporary, International Style approach, emphasizing functionality and clean lines.
description: A cluster of modern office towers with cylindrical and rectangular forms, dark glass facades, and regular window patterns. The buildings are interconnected, forming a cohesive urban block.
description_view_0: This view highlights the cylindrical towers and the central cluster of interconnected office buildings, showing the mix of heights and architectural forms.
description_view_1: From this angle, the cylindrical towers are prominent, and the staggered arrangement of the buildings is visible, with more emphasis on the depth of the complex.
description_view_2: This side view shows the elongated base of the complex and the alignment of the rectangular buildings, with the cylindrical towers set further back.
description_view_3: Here, the rectangular tower is most prominent, with the cylindrical towers visible behind, emphasizing the layered arrangement of the buildings.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows with horizontal banding, repeated uniformly across all facades.
